title: ASR Outdoor 66pc Pistol Cleaning Kit In Zippered Shell Case
description:
Keep your firearm clean and well-maintained with the ASR Outdoor 66 Piece Pistol Cleaning Kit In Zippered Shell Case! This set is compatible with: .38, .357, and 99mm caliber handguns, and comes with everything you need to keep it clean and running smoothly. This kit includes multiple sizes of: cleaning jags, copper brushes, and patch holders. It includes different kinds of cleaning rods, both rigid and flexible, as well as a pick & scraper combo. Additionally, it includes 50 patches, with two different sizes and a nylon brush. This is the perfect gift for any firearm owners in your life, so they can keep them clean and running smoothly!

  • PATCHES AND PATCH HOLDER: 50 Patches And Two Different Sized Patch Holders | Firearm Cleaning Supplies
  • KEEP IT ORGANIZED: Kit Comes In Compact, Zippered Hard Case Pouch | Keep Everything Together And Organized
